heading: View LDAP Configuration
body:
**Atlascli:**Atlas CLITo return the details for one LDAP configuration using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:```sh

atlas security ldap get [options]

```To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas security ldap get](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-security-ldap-get).**Ui:**Atlas UITo view your current LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) settings using the Atlas UI:Atlas displays your LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) authentication settings.To view your LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) *authorization* settings, toggle the button next to LDAP Authorization to On. Atlas displays your LDAP (Lightweight Directory Access Protocol) authorization settings.
